nameMeanings.name: Lance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the ancient Germanic personal name Lanzo, originally a short form of various compound names with the first element land ‘land, territory’ (for example, Lambert ), but later used as an independent name. It was introduced to England by the Normans, for whom it was a popular name among the ruling classes, perhaps partly because of association with Old French lance ‘lance, spear’ (see 2 below).
French: metonymic occupational name for a soldier who carried a lance, or a nickname for a skilled fighter, from Old French lance ‘lance, spear’.
Americanized form of German   Lanz   and   Lenz  .

variants.name: Lambert
meanings: English, French, Walloon, Dutch, German, Polish, Czech, and Slovak: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements land ‘land, territory’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. In England, the native Old English form Landbeorht was replaced by Lambert, the Continental form of the name that was taken to England by the Normans from France. The name gained wider currency in Britain in the Middle Ages with the immigration of weavers from Flanders, among whom Saint Lambert or Lamprecht, bishop of Maastricht in around 700, was a popular cult figure. In Italy the name was popularized in the Middle Ages as a result of the fame of Lambert I and II, Dukes of Spoleto and Holy Roman Emperors. Lambert is the second most frequent surname in Wallonia. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, for example Slovenian Lampret and Lampreht (see also Lampert ).

History: Aubin Lambert dit Champagne from Tourouvre in Orne, France, married Élisabeth Aubert in Quebec City, QC, in 1670; see also Champagne . Eustache Lambert from Boulogne-sur-Mer in Pas-de-Calais, France, married Marie Laurence in France c. 1656, died in Quebec City, QC, in 1673. Pierre Lambert from Fourmetot in Eure, France, married Marie Normand in Quebec City, QC, in 1680. Augustin Hébert dit Lambert, a descendant of Augustin Hébert from Paris, France, married Françoise Petit in Varennes, QC, in 1761. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Lancon
meanings: French (Lançon): diminutive of Lance ‘lance, spear’, or perhaps a topographic name for someone who lived in a thickly wooded area, or a metonymic occupational name for a woodcutter, from Old French lançon ‘branch of a tree’. Compare Lanson .
French (Lançon): habitational name from the town so named, in Bouches-du-Rhône.

variants.name: Lancelot
meanings: English and French: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Lancelot, a double diminutive Old French pet form of ancient Germanic Lanzo. Compare Lance . The popularity of the personal name owes much to the name of the best knight in the Arthurian romances, but the origin of his name, whilst probably as given above, has been disputed.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: John Lance was born in 1368, in Dartford, Kent, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 daughter with Isabella Davis. He died in his hometown, and was buried in Dartford, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: John Lance est né en 1368, à Dartford, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Isabella Davis. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Dartford, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: John Lance wurde 1368 in Dartford, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mit Isabella Davis mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Dartford, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: John Lance è nato il nel 1368 nel Dartford, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Isabella Davis. Morì nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Dartford, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Dartford, Dartford Borough, Kent, Englan: イギリスイギリスケントダルトフォード
ja.Dartford, Kent, England: イギリスケントダルトフォード
ja.lifeSummary: John Lanceは1368年にイギリスイギリスケントダルトフォードで生まれた。彼はIsabella Davisとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントダルトフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Lance(은)는 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 더르트퍼드에서 태어났다. 그는 Isabella Davis(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 더르트퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Lance nasceu em 1368, em Dartford, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Isabella Davis. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Dartford, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: John Lance родился в 1368 г. в местности дартфорд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Isabella Davis. Он умер в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности дартфорд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: John Lance nació en 1368, en Dartford, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Isabella Davis. Murió en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Dartford, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
